summary: No-ship: one remaining hook race can still collapse distinct same-cwd Claude sessions.

findings.title: Concurrent hooks can update the wrong row after a sid-less match is claimed
findings.recommendation: Under the state write lock, if the matched map entry now has a different claudeSessionId than opts.claudeSessionId, do not update it. Re-route to/create a UUID-keyed row for the incoming sid, still honoring the worktree tombstone check. Add a regression with two concurrent applyHookEvent calls for different session_id values against the same pre-existing sid-less cwd row.
